name: Tranexamic acid (TXA)
description: Ihe antifibrinolytic nke na-egbochi mkpụkọ ọbara. Na-ebelata oke onwu site na ujo hemorrhagic mgbe enyere ya n'oge. CoTCCC kwadoro maka ndị niile merụrụ ahụ nwere nnukwu ọbara ọgbụgba ma ọ bụ nọ n'ihe ize ndụ nke nnukwu ọbara ọgbụgba.
indications: Ọbara ọbara dị n'ime ma ọ bụ nke a na-enyo enyo
Nnukwu ihe ize ndụ nke ọbara ọgbụgba (usoro mmerụ ahụ)
dose: 1g IV/IO karịrị nkeji iri, sochiri 1g IV/IO karịa awa asatọ. Ọ bụrụ na IV/IO adịghị: 650mg PO x2 (1.3g mkpokọta) -- TCCC PO nhọrọ.
window: A ghaghị inye ya n'ime awa 3 nke mmerụ ahụ gasịrị. Agafe awa 3, TXA nwere ike ịbawanye ọnwụ -- enyela.
contraindications: Akụkọ banyere ọrịa thromboembolic (DVT, PE, ọrịa strok)
warnings: Oge ndekọ nke nchịkwa ozugbo - windo bụ awa 3 site na oge mmerụ ahụ, ọ bụghị oge mbata.
Ejikọtala dose IV (1g) na ọnụọgụ ọnụ.

pediatric.dose: 15 mg / kg IV (max 1g). Ihe akaebe na-apụta -- jiri mkpebi ụlọ ọgwụ mee ihe.

obstetric.note: E gosipụtara maka ọbara ọgbụgba mgbe ọmụmụ nwa. Nchekwa na ime ime. Otu ọgwụ ndị okenye na-emetụta.

source: JTS CPG: Hemorrhage Control / CoTCCC TCCC Guidelines
